meta.title: Arcadas do Fado — Restaurant with Live Fado, Almancil Algarve
meta.description: Restaurant with live fado music in Almancil, Algarve. Traditional Portuguese cuisine and fado show every Friday and Saturday at 9:30 PM. Book now.
meta.keywords: live fado Almancil, fado restaurant Algarve, fado dinner Almancil, Portuguese cuisine Algarve, Arcadas do Fado

hero.title: A Fado Night in the Algarve
hero.subtitle: Portuguese cuisine and live fado music in Almancil

espaco.title: A Space with Soul
espaco.p1: At Arcadas do Fado, every detail has been carefully considered to create a unique experience — a space where elegance meets Portuguese authenticity. An intimate interior, lovingly decorated, evoking the atmosphere of the old fado houses of Lisbon.
espaco.p2: With a capacity of 60 guests, our space is the perfect setting for an unforgettable evening. The warm lighting and natural materials create a welcoming ambiance where music and gastronomy merge into a truly special experience.
espaco.img1Alt: Elegant interior of Arcadas do Fado restaurant with warm ambient lighting
espaco.img2Alt: Portuguese decorative details at Arcadas do Fado restaurant
espaco.img3Alt: Table set at Arcadas do Fado for dinner with live fado
espaco.img4Alt: Main dining room at Arcadas do Fado in Almancil

fado.title: The Soul of Portugal on Stage
fado.subtitle: Every night, a celebration of Portugal's most profound cultural expression
fado.historyP1: Arcadas do Fado was born from a deep passion for the most genuine expression of the Portuguese soul. Inspired by the traditional fado houses of Lisbon — where saudade transforms into melody and emotion finds its voice — we brought this legacy to the heart of the Algarve.
fado.historyP2: Here, the nostalgia of the past is projected into the future: Portuguese guitars vibrating with centuries of history, voices laden with emotion that speak directly to the heart. An experience that goes beyond mere entertainment — it is a journey into the soul of Portugal.
fado.alexandraBio: Born on 25 April 1950 in Soalheira, Fundão, Alexandra carries within her roots a rare authenticity. With a childhood in Mozambique that shaped her worldview, she joined the iconic musical «Amália» by Filipe La Féria in 1999 — premiered at the Cine Casino do Funchal and Teatro Politeama, one of the greatest successes in Portuguese musical theatre. She closes every night at Arcadas do Fado with her unmistakable voice.
fado.show2Desc: 1 to 2 fadistas per night, in rotation

eventos.title: Special Nights & Private Events
eventos.description: Arcadas do Fado hosts private events for up to 60 guests (subject to availability). Birthdays, corporate events, group dinners, weddings — every occasion deserves an unforgettable fado night.
eventos.card1Desc: Celebrate your special day with live music and Portuguese cuisine in a unique atmosphere.
eventos.card2Desc: Business dinners and team building with an authentic Portuguese cultural experience.
eventos.card3Desc: Weddings, honeymoons and special moments that deserve a truly unforgettable evening.
